title: aMod
description: aMod, a simple management tool for servers.
body:
## aMod, a simple server management plugin.

With a lot of versions being supported, (probably) active development and taking requests, this (might) be the perfect server management plugin.

aMod's goal is to help with moderation. I am open to command requests.

Commands:
-------------
/akick - Kicks a player from the server.
Usage: /akick <player> [reason]

/aban - Bans a player from the server, preventing them from reconnecting.
Usage: /aban <player> [reason]

/aban-ip - Bans an IP address, blocking all connections from that IP to the server.
Usage: /aban-ip <IP> [reason]

/alog - Logs messages to a file (logs.txt), useful for general logging purposes.
Usage: /alog 

/acmdlog - Logs commands to a file (cmd-log.txt), useful for tracking player commands.
Usage: Automatically logs player commands when executed.

/aclear - Clears the inventory of a player.
Usage: /aclear <player>

/acheck - Checks player information, such as their stats or status.
Usage: /acheck <player>

/atp - Teleports a player to another player or location.
Usage: /atp <player> <target>

/afly - Toggles flight mode for a player.
Usage: /afly <player>

/aspeed - Changes a player's movement speed, such as walking or flying speed.
Usage: /aspeed <player> <speed>

/awhois - Displays detailed information about a player, such as their IP, UUID, etc.
Usage: /awhois <player>

/asay - Broadcasts a message to the entire server, often used for announcements.
Usage: /asay <message>
